title: Common Field Preset
description: A reusable scoring field injected into game definitions at runtime by the Collator.

id.description: Unique preset identifier. Referenced by type_defaults prefix/suffix arrays.

label.description: Display label. May contain {{variable_name}} template syntax.

weight.description: Multiplier applied to this field's value when computing total score.

sortOrder.description: Display order within the prefix or suffix group.

position.description: Whether this preset is injected before or after game-specific fields.

tier.description: Which league tier this preset applies to. 'all' = injected for every scored game.

audience.description: Visibility: judge = shown on field tablet; admin = Collator dashboard only.

config.description: Widget-specific config: min, max, placeholder, options, defaultValue.
